decision_domains.question: Is KT allowed to expand beyond the current bounded externality ceiling?
decision_domains.default_effect: KT remains at E1_SAME_HOST_DETACHED_REPLAY and no Gate D decision widens externality by default.

decision_domains.question: Are new counted receipt families or measurement domains authorized beyond the Gate C regime?
decision_domains.default_effect: No new counted domains are authorized by default beyond the existing Gate C comparator and authority regime.

decision_domains.question: Is KT allowed to evolve itself under law through adapters, tournaments, promotion, demotion, merge, retirement, and rollback?
decision_domains.default_effect: KT remains manually curated by default and no adaptive self-evolution loop is authorized by this law alone.

decision_domains.question: What comparative or competitive claims is KT allowed to make relative to other systems?
decision_domains.default_effect: No new external comparative or competitive claims are authorized by default beyond the bounded Gate C live-vs-baseline proof.

decision_domains.question: What commercial posture is KT allowed to take after Gate C exit?
decision_domains.default_effect: No commercial activation is authorized by default and KT remains a bounded post-Gate-C lab system until an explicit decision receipt says otherwise.

decision_receipt_requirement.authority_rule: A Gate D decision is valid only as a same-head decision receipt that selects explicit posture values for all required domains and authorizes later B04 activation without itself performing that activation.

rollback_rule: If no valid same-head Gate D decision receipt exists, all domains remain at default restrictive posture and B04 activation remains locked.
claim_ceiling_before_selection: Post-Gate-C bounded governed execution only. No Gate D widening, activation, or new counting is authorized by this law alone.
fail_conditions: Any posture is silently selected inside the definition-only law tranche.
B04 activation is allowed without a same-head Gate D decision receipt.
Any Gate D decision law implies externality widening, comparator expansion, product widening, or frontier claims by default.
Any Gate D decision law is treated as implementation or activation instead of decision space only.
reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
claim_boundary: This law defines the Gate D decision ballot only. It does not select any posture, does not authorize B04 activation, and does not widen externality, counted domains, adaptive evolution, comparative claims, or commercial scope.
